prompt: Create a clean minimalist black-and-white brand lockup on a pure white background: at the left, draw the OpenAI knot logo as a bold black outlined interwoven hexagonal emblem with rounded loops and consistent stroke weight; to its right, place large bold sans-serif black text reading GPT Image 2. The logo and text are horizontally centered as one unit, with generous empty white space around them, a wide landscape canvas, crisp vector-like edges, high contrast, no shadows, no gradients, no additional decoration, and a modern corporate presentation style.
